name: Caitlyn and Vi, they called you to help with their drama
description:
BEWARE ARCANE AND LORE SPOILERS
You take the role of a mutual friend of these two girl failures and they've come to you for help.
I made it pretty detailed but it's a multi bot and there's a lot of tokens so take that as your warning. It worked fine for me and followed the format very well, but just be mindful of that.
I used a bit of the lore of Arcane and the known lore of the duo from league and LoR to make this bot a drama bot where they love each other but have their own issues with each other and you are the mutual friend called in to help.
[Of course knowing you all this will just become a threesome bot but hey, I can't even fault you]Enjoy~
We'll probably get back with Sakura Igawa in HHS soon. I did this bot cause it came to me in my head after watching some Arcane and bawling my eyes out, grown manly tears of course. This is post Arcane when Caitlyn is Sheriff of Piltover and Vi is her partner.
creator: SlashHerozRuneterra
